name: levelmoment-sdk
description: Client SDKs for Level Moment — educational ad breaks for games. Build root for the @levelmoment/* npm packages.
comment:scripts: Build only. tsup's DTS emit type-checks each package during build. Ordered core-first so web/react-native resolve @levelmoment/sdk-core's built dist.

scripts.build: npm run build -w sdk/core && npm run build -w sdk/web && npm run build -w sdk/react-native && npm run build -w sdk/mcp

comment:devDependencies: Build-time only. The @levelmoment/sdk-react-native tsup DTS build needs react + react-native types resolvable from the workspace root. react is pinned to 18.2.0 to match react-native 0.74.7's EXACT peer so a clean install resolves without --legacy-peer-deps. When bumping react-native, bump react to the new RN release's exact peer in lockstep. They live at the workspace root so individual packages don't pin a conflicting react.
